It sounds like the fear of being misunderstood or dismissed carries a lot of weight for you, and that it really ties back to those deeper feelings of not being good enough. I can see how that would make the prospect of opening up feel heavy and daunting. You mentioned wanting to believe that your feelings are valid, which is so important. Can you reflect on what it would look like to hold onto that belief, even in the face of those fears? How might that shift your approach to sharing with others?
